concerns.text: FR-006 specifies 'two-way repeated-measures ANOVA' but the design uses independent samples (1000 different games for full vs limited context). Repeated-measures ANOVA requires the same subjects measured under both conditions. This is a fundamental statistical error that invalidates the validation approach. Use independent-samples ANOVA or mixed-effects model instead.

FR-005 defines Cue-Retrieval Efficiency 'relative to chance level' but does not specify what chance level is (e.g., random baseline, uniform distribution). This must be explicitly defined to ensure the metric is interpretable and comparable across conditions.

User Story 3 requests power-law fitting with only 3 data points (agent counts 3, 5, 7). This is statistically underpowered for reliable power-law estimation. Consider adding more agent counts or acknowledging the limitation in the analysis plan.

SC-003 specifies 'maximum absolute change ≤ 0.07' as a success threshold. Per spec template guidance, planning docs should defer specific empirical values. Either justify this threshold with prior literature or mark as [deferred].
